title: Computer System Validation Master Plan
ai_summary: Defines the framework for assessing, validating, and maintaining computerized systems used in regulated GMP operations.
common_questions: What do I do when installing a new computer system?
Does this software need validation?
What document covers PLC validation?
Does this require Part 11 review?
use_when: A new computerized system is introduced
A GMP software system is modified
Electronic records or electronic signatures are used
A PLC, HMI, MES, SCADA, or historian is implemented

title: Computer System Validation Assessment Form
ai_summary: Assessment form used to determine validation impact, GxP applicability, and Part 11 requirements for computerized systems.
common_questions: What form do I use for a new software system?
How do I assess Part 11 applicability?
What form determines if a system is GxP?
use_when: A new software system is proposed
Part 11 or GxP impact must be assessed

title: Deviation Reporting and CAPA Work Instruction
ai_summary: Provides routing guidance for documenting deviations, initiating investigations, escalating events, and linking issues to CAPA when required.
common_questions: What do I do if equipment fails during production?
How do I report a deviation?
Who do I notify for a process excursion?
What document covers manufacturing errors?
use_when: A deviation investigation may be required

title: Deviation Initial Assessment Form
ai_summary: Form used to capture the initial description, impact assessment, containment actions, and notification details for a deviation.
common_questions: What form do I use to open a deviation?
How do I document an initial deviation assessment?
Where do I record containment actions?
use_when: An initial quality impact assessment is needed

title: Data Integrity and Good Documentation Practices
ai_summary: Defines documentation expectations for GMP records, including corrections, electronic signatures, contemporaneous recording, and ALCOA+ principles.
common_questions: How do I correct a batch record?
What are GDP rules?
What does ALCOA mean?
How do I handle a documentation error?

title: Cleanroom Gowning and Personnel Hygiene Requirements
ai_summary: Defines personnel hygiene and gowning requirements for entry into classified cleanroom areas.
common_questions: What do I wear in the cleanroom?
What document covers gowning?
How do I enter an aseptic area?
use_when: PPE requirements for classified areas are needed

title: Environmental Monitoring Program for Sterile Operations
ai_summary: Defines cleanroom environmental monitoring requirements, including viable and non-viable sampling, alert limits, action limits, and response expectations.
common_questions: What procedure covers environmental monitoring?
What do I do for an alert limit excursion?
Where are cleanroom monitoring requirements?
use_when: Cleanroom particle or microbial results are reviewed
Alert or action limits are exceeded

title: Process Validation Standard Operating Procedure
ai_summary: Defines requirements for process validation planning, PPQ execution, sampling strategy, acceptance criteria, and validation reporting.
common_questions: How do I validate a process?
What document covers PPQ?
What is required for process validation?

title: Process Validation Protocol Template
ai_summary: Template used to define PPQ objectives, sampling plans, critical process parameters, critical quality attributes, and acceptance criteria.
common_questions: What template do I use for PPQ?
Where do I define validation acceptance criteria?
What form supports process validation?
use_when: A process validation protocol is drafted
PPQ sampling and acceptance criteria are documented

title: Sanitization and Disinfection of Controlled Areas
ai_summary: Provides routing information for cleaning and disinfecting controlled manufacturing areas using approved agents and defined frequencies.
common_questions: What document covers cleanroom cleaning?
How do I disinfect a controlled area?
What work instruction covers sporicidal cleaning?

title: Product Recall Procedure and Crisis Management Plan
ai_summary: Defines routing for mock and actual product recalls, field corrections, quarantine of returned inventory, and health authority notification coordination.
common_questions: What document covers a product recall?
How do I initiate a field correction?
What happens during a mock recall?
use_when: A recall or field correction may be required
